# https://tidesandcurrents.noaa.gov/noaatideannual.html?id=8720587
# download tides into files named, for example: 8720587_2026.txt, 8720587_2027.txt
# grep -Ph '\t' 8720587_????.txt | grep -v 'Date' | cut -f 1,3,9 | tr -s '\t' ' ' | tr '/' '-' | sed 's/H/High/g' | sed 's/L/Low/g' > tides.txt
# do not forget to re-add these comments and save as utf-8 with linux eol
